headline: Bürgenstock locked down for Friday Iran-US signing
summary: Nidwalden closes roads, cable cars and trails and evicts resort guests ahead of the Iran-US ceremony.

headline: US export ban on Anthropic frontier models leaves Switzerland and Europe cut off
summary: SRF details the Swiss fallout of Washington's order barring foreign access to Anthropic's Mythos/Fable 5; UK AISI found 32-step autonomous attack capability comparable to rivals.

headline: National Council rejects EFTA-Mercosur free-trade agreement
summary: Swiss lower house voted no to the EFTA-Mercosur free-trade deal during the summer session.

headline: Parliament only partially finances 13th AHV pension
summary: National Council backed only partial financing for the 13th old-age pension as mixed-financing failed.

headline: Seco report: wage undercutting in nearly one Swiss firm in five
summary: State economy secretariat finds frequent wage dumping but declining undeclared work.

headline: Leaked 14-point US-Iran draft fills in terms of Friday Bürgenstock signing
summary: CNN-obtained draft: permanent ceasefire, Hormuz reopening in 30 days, $24bn assets unfrozen, $300bn reconstruction fund, 60-day nuclear window; missiles dropped from agenda.

headline: G7 summit in Evian closes without rupture as leaders defer to Trump
summary: SRF wrap: summit held together with no joint criticism of the US-Iran deal and no climate/migration language.

headline: Russian artist and Putin critic Robert Kuzakov shot dead in Poland
summary: Émigré caricaturist Robert Kuzakov (Semyon Skrepetsky) shot dead in Poland three days after a Berlin protest near the Russian embassy.

headline: Telegram challenges India app ban as unconstitutional
summary: Telegram filed in a New Delhi court calling India's exam-leak block unconstitutional and disproportionate.

headline: UK orders Google to improve search transparency
summary: UK competition regulator directs Google to provide greater transparency in search services.

headline: Oracle June 2026 Critical Patch Update: CVSS 10.0 RCEs across WebLogic, Coherence, WebCenter, Solaris
summary: Quarterly Oracle CPU ships dozens of critical unauthenticated RCE fixes including WebLogic Console (CVE-2026-35301), Coherence (CVE-2026-35308) and Solaris RAD (CVE-2026-46978).

headline: Android June 2026 bulletin: CVSS 10.0 NFC and Telecomm local privilege escalations
summary: Android security bulletin patches critical NFC event spoof (CVE-2026-0081) and Telecomm unauthorized-call (CVE-2026-28615) flaws enabling local EoP with no user interaction.

headline: CISA KEV adds Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager path traversal CVE-2026-20262
summary: Actively exploited authenticated path traversal allowing arbitrary file write on SD-WAN Manager; distinct from May's CVE-2026-20182.

headline: Postiz JWT-trust flaw lets low-priv user forge sessions CVE-2026-48781
summary: Postiz AI scheduler trusted a self-signed JWT carrying attacker-controlled claims; low-priv users could impersonate anyone. Fixed 2.21.8.

headline: Streambert Zip Slip archive path-traversal CVE-2026-48055
summary: Electron media app fails to sanitise archive entry names during subtitle extraction, enabling arbitrary file write and code execution (<=2.4.0).

headline: The Discrete-Log Clock: how a transformer learns modular multiplication
summary: Shows grokked modular multiplication is sparse under the multiplicative character transform, not the dense additive Fourier basis prior work reported.

headline: STATEWITNESS: activation explainer for auditing deception in reasoning LLMs
summary: A decoder reads a target model's hidden states and answers natural-language queries about possible deception across seven datasets.

headline: The Benchmark Illusion: pruned LLMs pass multiple choice but fail open generation
summary: High-sparsity pruning (esp. Wanda) preserves multiple-choice accuracy while breaking free-form answering on multilingual QA.

headline: LLM-as-Environment-Engineer: policy designs its own next RL training environment
summary: Current policy analyzes failure trajectories and proposes the next-stage RL environment config; introduces MAPF-FrozenLake testbed.

headline: Diffusion (SDE) approximation for TD learning under Markovian noise
summary: An SDE model for linear TD(0) separating projected-Bellman contraction from Markovian-sampling fluctuations, explaining the error floor.

headline: Tracing the internal lifecycle of code reasoning in LLMs
summary: Models 'brew' answers (linearly recoverable layers early) then resolve into Resolved/Overprocessed/Misresolved/Unresolved outcomes.
